subject: [PATCH v2 2/3] fuse: check connection abort during ring creation

2026-05-16.patch_summary: This patch adds a check to ensure that a connection is still active before creating a new ring in the fuse_uring_create function. Without this check, a race condition between fuse_uring_create and fuse_chan_abort can lead to unnecessary allocation and teardown of resources, which are eventually cleaned up by fuse_uring_destruct but may linger until process exit even after the connection has been aborted.
